display_text: Magic Stick, Cost: 200: Stores a charge each time an enemy within 1200 range casts a spell. Can hold up to 10 charges. Active: Instantly restores 15 health and 15 mana for each stored charge. A valuable reactive sustain tool for surviving bursts of enemy spell damage. Stats: Max Charges: 10, CD: 17s, Charge Radius: 1200.

display_text: Magic Stick, Cost: 200: Provides no permanent attribute bonuses. Its power comes entirely from its reactive healing ability based on enemy spell casts.

display_text: Magic Stick, Cost: 200: Key defensive tool against high-spell-damage lineups. Builds charges automatically during frequent spellcasting from both allies and enemies. Using it at full charges provides 150 instant HP and mana, turning around trades or escapes. Crucial for surviving lanes with aggressive spell harass.

display_text: Magic Stick, Cost: 200: Core early purchase for heroes susceptible to magic burst (like supports or offlaners). Extremely cost-effective when facing heroes with low-cooldown spells (e.g., Bristleback, Skywrath Mage). Builds into Magic Wand and Holy Locket for enhanced utility.
